layout_settings.section_title:
At home in
The City in a Park
layout_settings.section_h2:
Set beside the lawn and promenade
of Downtown Park
layout_settings.section_text: Park Row lives at the intersection of culture and calm. Walk to boutiques, cafés, and the arts district; return to birdsong and greenery at your door.
From neighborhood markets to Michelin-star dining, from lakeside walks to downtown energy—it is a city both dynamic and deeply livable.
Elevated pedestrian experience, expanded walkability, additional art experiences, and connections between the park and the skyline. Park Row stands as the bridge between them.
